topStories.title: Supreme Court does not interfere with order allowing Adani to acquire JAL, asks NCLAT to decide promptly
topStories.description: The top court asked the NCLAT to decide the plea and the counter petition expeditiously by hearing them on an “out of turn basis” on the dispute over the acquisition of JAL by the Adani group

topStories.title: Saudi Arabia hikes Arab Light crude to record premium for Asian refiners as US-Iran war continues
topStories.description: Saudi Arabia has raised the price of its Arab Light crude for Asian buyers to a record premium of $19.50, amid heightened tensions in the Middle East. This increase, though significant, was reportedly lower than analysts anticipated due to volatility in oil benchmarks.

topStories.title: Iran claims US airman rescue may have been cover to ‘steal enriched uranium’
topStories.description: Amid the ongoing Middle East conflict, Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei alleged that the US's plan to rescue its downed airman could have been a cover to steal the country's enriched uranium.

topStories.title: US Stock Market Today | Dow Jones | Nasdaq Live: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures edge up as investors weigh Iran war developments
topStories.description: Dow Jones Today | Nasdaq | S&P 500 | US Stock Market Live Updates: At 7:13 a.m. ET, Dow E-minis were down 62 points, or 0.13%, S&P 500 E-minis were up 4.5 points, or 0.07%, and Nasdaq 100 E-minis were up 75 points, or 0.31%. Prolonged closure of the Strait of ‌Hormuz, an essential chokepoint in global oil trade, has weighed on energy prices and has reinforced inflation fears.

topStories.title: White House declares ‘press lid’ sparking speculation over Trump's health; here is what we know
topStories.description: Trump's health issues include high cholesterol and Chronic Venous Insufficiency, confirmed by his physician. The White House has denied rumours of a medical emergency, stating he is fit for duty.

topStories.title: Iran’s top university bombed as US, Israel intensify attacks; 34 killed - Al Jazeera
topStories.description: Iran’s top university bombed as US, Israel intensify attacks; 34 killed  Al Jazeera

dailyNews.title: Assembly elections LIVE: Congress keeps singing to Pakistan's tunes, compromising nation’s security, says PM Modi
dailyNews.description: On the development front, Prime Minister Narendra Modi alleged that the Congress had always taken a myopic view on the matter, while the BJP works towards ensuring long-term development of the nation

dailyNews.title: Who is Steve Hilton? Trump-endorsed Republican aiming to replace Gavin Newsom in 2026 governor election
dailyNews.description: Steve Hilton’s career spans British politics, Silicon Valley innovation, and American media. With a blend of policy experience, media visibility, and now a high-profile endorsement from Donald Trump, he has emerged as a key Republican figure in California’s 2026 gubernatorial race.

dailyNews.title: Congress accuses PM of ‘U-turn’ on women’s reservation law
dailyNews.description: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh says the government had introduced the condition that the women’s reservation legislation would come into effect only after the Census and delimitation was completed, but had now changed its position on this

dailyNews.title: Ahead of Donald Trump’s Iran war briefing, Tehran rejects US 15-point plan as ‘illogical,’ hardens stance
dailyNews.description: While delivering Iranian stance on the 15-point plan, Iran foreign ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei also said that any negotiations cannot take place under threats.

dailyNews.title: Easter Post On Iran Puts Trump Under Fire, Lawmakers Raise Removal Question
dailyNews.description: The 25th Amendment to the US Constitution, ratified in 1967, provides for the transfer of presidential power in cases of incapacity.

dailyNews.title: DR Congo agrees to take deportees from the US
dailyNews.description: The country will start receiving deportees from this month but has not said how many they will accept.

dailyNews.title: Young gray whale dies after swimming up river in Washington state
dailyNews.description: Hunger is a likely reason the whale, dubbed Willapa Willy, travelled inland, experts say.

dailyNews.title: Donald Trump’s new Hormuz deadline, ceasefire push and rescue presser: What we know on US-Iran war in its 6th week
dailyNews.description: More than 5,000 people have been killed in the West Asia war far so far. The causalities are almost three-quarters of them in Iran, according to government organizations and the US-based Human Rights Activists News Agency.

dailyNews.title: Who was Majid Khademi? Iran's Revolutionary Guards Intelligence head killed in US strikes
dailyNews.description: Majid Khademi took over as head of the intelligence organisation of Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps in 2025 after Israeli air strikes killed his predecessor, Mohammad Khotami.

dailyNews.title: ‘Donald Trump is dead’ trends again: Social media continues to speculate about US President’s health
dailyNews.description: Rumors about Donald Trump's health have intensified due to his age and brief absences. Social media exploded with claims of a medical emergency after a routine press lid, prompting official denials and a Trump post asserting his good health.

dailyNews.title: Amid Trump health scare, here's the reason why US President skipped Easter Sunday events
dailyNews.description: Amidst speculation over Donald Trump's health due to missed appearances, the White House issued a statement. Despite rumors of hospitalization, Trump continued his rhetoric on Iran.

dailyNews.title: WNBA champ Natasha Cloud takes issue with Trump's Iran message on Easter
dailyNews.description: New York Liberty guard Natasha Cloud slammed President Donald Trump for his Easter Sunday warning to Iran, saying a president threatening to bomb "is not a man of Christ."

dailyNews.title: Rescue expert says most dangerous moment comes after ‘jackpot’ call in recovery behind enemy lines
dailyNews.description: A veteran rescue expert reacts to the U.S. airman rescue in Iran, explaining why getting home after securing the objective is often the most dangerous part.

dailyNews.title: Amazon job text scam warning signs
dailyNews.description: Fraudsters are using texts offering jobs to target phones, often posing as Amazon with suspicious contact details and no hiring process.

dailyNews.title: NBC’s Savannah Guthrie emotionally thanks fans for prayers, support in return to 'Today'
dailyNews.description: NBC's Savannah Guthrie largely kept the focus on the news during her highly anticipated return to "Today" on Monday after a two-month absence.

dailyNews.title: Newsom's California rail project now expected to cost $126B, official admits, with still no tracks laid
dailyNews.description: California's high-speed rail costs have ballooned to an estimated $126 billion, with critics calling the LA-to-San Francisco project a "train to nowhere."

dailyNews.title: 'Credible intelligence' reveals North Korea's successor to Kim Jong Un, South Korea says
dailyNews.description: South Korea's National Intelligence Service thinks North Korean figure Kim Jong Un's daughter has been lined up to become Kim's eventual successor, lawmakers noted, according to Reuters.

topStories.title: Harvard alum praises Trump admin targeting university admissions policies, handling of antisemitism
topStories.description: Harvard graduate praises the Trump admin for launching new federal probes alleging antisemitism failures and illegal race-based admissions preferences.

topStories.title: President Trump makes endorsement in California gubernatorial race: 'He will be a GREAT Governor'
topStories.description: President Donald Trump endorsed California gubernatorial candidate Steve Hilton ahead of the upcoming June primary in the Golden State.

topStories.title: Expert weighs in on rescue missions for downed U.S. fighter jet, Trump's threats against Iran
topStories.description: Aaron MacLean, a retired U.S. Marine and CBS News national security analyst, joins "CBS Mornings" to discuss the rescue missions for crew members after Iran downed a U.S. fighter jet on Friday and President Trump's threats against Iran over the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Trump's profanity-laced ultimatum to Iran looms over new bid for truce
topStories.description: Trump's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges if it doesn't make a deal to end the war by Tuesday is looming over a Pakistani ceasefire push.

dailyNews.title: Trump's profanity-laced ultimatum to Iran looms over new bid for truce
dailyNews.description: Trump's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges if it doesn't make a deal to end the war by Tuesday is looming over a Pakistani ceasefire push.

dailyNews.title: Trump makes explicit threat to Iran over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted an explicit, threatening message to Iran on social media on Sunday over the Strait of Hormuz. Meanwhile, Mr. Trump is set to hold a briefing Monday afternoon on the successful search-and-rescue mission for a missing crew member after Iran downed F15-E fighter jet. Nancy Cordes has more.

dailyNews.title: Latest news on Iran war as Trump ratchets up threats over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump is expected to address the rescue of two U.S. airmen after their F-15E fighter jet was downed over Iran. This comes as Mr. Trump's threats over the Strait of Hormuz get heated. CBS News' Aaron Navarro and Ramy Inocencio report.

dailyNews.title: Liam Ramos' parents say 5-year-old constantly worries about being detained by ICE again
dailyNews.description: In a CBS News exclusive interview, Camilo Montoya-Galvez speaks with five-year-old Liam Ramos and his parents about their detainment by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, and how the Trump administration is still trying to deport them.

dailyNews.title: CIA World Factbook shuttered by Trump administration
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has shut down the CIA World Factbook, and there's much lamenting about the demise of a free, trusted source many people used to check basic facts about countries.

dailyNews.title: "WE GOT HIM!," Trump declares after U.S. airman rescued deep inside Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump hailed the rescue of a U.S. airman who was missing almost two days inside Iran — and threatened to hit power plants if Iran doesn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: On Iran, Trump Keeps World Off Balance With Ever-Changing Threats
dailyNews.description: Global leaders are struggling in their efforts to find a way to end the American-Israeli war on Iran, and they are spooked about what President Trump might do next.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Lesson From Risky Rescue: Threaten to Go Harder at Iran
dailyNews.description: In an expletive-laced social media post, the president said Iran should open the Strait of Hormuz or he would bomb bridges and power plants.

dailyNews.title: Plunging International Student Enrollment Under Trump Squeezes Colleges
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration’s campaign to curtail international students is not just hitting the elite schools targeted by the government.

dailyNews.title: Forget the A.I. Apocalypse. Memes Have Already Nuked Our Culture.
dailyNews.description: From our jokes and slang to the White House’s policy messaging, internet “brain rot” has escaped our phones to take over … well, everything.

dailyNews.title: Iran and US Receive Proposal for 45-Day Ceasefire: Report
dailyNews.description: Iran and the United States have reportedly received a proposal calling for a 45-day ceasefire and the reopening of the crucial Strait of Hormuz. The proposal was sent by mediators from Egypt, Pakistan and Turkey, according to the Associated Press. Over the weekend, President Donald Trump imposed a new Tuesday deadline to reopen the Strait of Hormuz in a profane-filled that threatened to destroy Iran's civilian infrastructure. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Sen. Kaine skeptical Congress will pass $1.5T military budget
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tim Kaine, D-Va., expressed skepticism on “Meet the Press” Sunday about the Trump administration’s 2027 budget plan, which includes a request of $1.5 trillion from Congress to fund the Defense Department.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls rescue of F-15E airman an ‘Easter Miracle’
dailyNews.description: In a text message to “Meet the Press” moderator Kristen Welker, President Trump reacted to U.S. forces safely rescuing the second F-15E crew member of a two-seat fighter jet that went down over Iran on Friday.
